coreValues.description: Unwavering commitment to transparency in commodity pricing, quality verification, and ethical procurement practices across all market operations.
Safeguarding India's food supply chain through strategic commodity reserves, crisis-responsive distribution networks, and government-coordinated procurement.
Creating predictable market conditions for farmers and buyers through consistent quality standards, reliable logistics, and long-term partnerships.
Real-time traceability from farm to warehouse, with complete documentation, blockchain-verified transactions, and open regulatory compliance.

timeline.title: National Corporation Established
timeline.description: Founded as a government-backed enterprise to stabilize agricultural commodity markets and support farmer welfare programs.

timeline.title: Multi-State Expansion
timeline.description: Extended operations to 12 states, establishing the first integrated mandi network for transparent price discovery.

timeline.title: ISO 9001 Certification
timeline.description: Achieved international quality management certification, setting new benchmarks for commodity handling standards.

timeline.title: Digital Infrastructure Launch
timeline.description: Deployed real-time inventory management systems across all warehouses, enabling transparent stock visibility.

timeline.title: Climate-Controlled Storage Network
timeline.description: Commissioned 25 advanced warehouses with humidity and temperature regulation for premium commodity preservation.

timeline.title: Blockchain Traceability Pilot
timeline.description: Implemented distributed ledger technology for end-to-end commodity tracking and tamper-proof documentation.

timeline.title: Pan-India Coverage Achieved
timeline.description: Reached 160+ mandis and 42 warehouses, serving as the national benchmark for commodity logistics excellence.

governancePrinciples.title: Regulatory Compliance
governancePrinciples.description: Full adherence to FSSAI, BIS, and APMC regulations with quarterly external audits and continuous compliance monitoring.

governancePrinciples.title: Stakeholder Accountability
governancePrinciples.description: Published annual transparency reports detailing procurement volumes, pricing mechanisms, and farmer payment timelines.

governancePrinciples.title: Operational Transparency
governancePrinciples.description: Open access to quality test reports, warehouse inventory levels, and logistics tracking for all registered buyers.

governancePrinciples.title: Crisis Response Mandate
governancePrinciples.description: Government-coordinated buffer stock management for national food security during market disruptions or natural disasters.
